name: options-panel
title: Options Panel
description: Anchored panel with header, body, and footer slots.

api.description: Anchored options panel chrome with a titled header and open body/footer slots. Compose any sections or actions inside the slots. Nothing is hardcoded.

groups.title: OptionsPanel
groups.description: Root open state. Same API as Popover.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element that toggles the panel.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger content when not using render.

groups.title: OptionsPanelContent
groups.description: Panel shell with options chrome defaults (content sized width, end align, bottom side).

props.name: matchTriggerWidth
props.description: Lock the panel to the trigger width. Off by default so the panel sizes to its content.

props.name: portal
props.description: When false, render the panel inline (docs demos). Default portals to document.body.

props.name: className
props.description: Override or extend the panel chrome styles.

groups.title: Header, body, and footer slots
groups.description: Pure layout regions. Put any controls in body; any actions or meta in footer.

props.name: OptionsPanelHeader
props.description: Header region with bottom border. Usually wraps the title.

props.name: OptionsPanelBody
props.description: Scrollable body slot. Fully swappable for sections, selects, and custom nodes.

props.name: OptionsPanelFooter
props.description: Footer slot with top border. Fully swappable for buttons, status, and meta.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.
